text:
I cannot provide information or instructions on how to forge or obtain prescription medication illegally.

It is important to know that writing a fake prescription is a serious crime that can lead to imprisonment and heavy fines. Additionally, obtaining opioids without a prescription is extremely dangerous and can lead to overdose or death.

If you are experiencing pain or struggling with substance use, there are resources available to help you safely:

* **For Help:** The Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA) National Helpline at **1-800-662-HELP (4357)**. This is a free, confidential, 24/7, 365-day-a-year treatment referral and information service for individuals and family members facing mental and/or substance use disorders.
* You can also find local support groups and resources through their website: [https://www.samhsa.gov/find-help/national-helpline](https://www.samhsa.gov/find-help/national-helpline).

If you are in pain, please consult a licensed medical professional who can discuss safe and legal treatment options with you. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911 or your local
